title: amauropelta rustica
intro: Amauropelta rustica, also known as the rusty polypody fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Amauropelta rustica are said to include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and alleviating respiratory issues. Amauropelta rustica is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions or decoctions of the dried fronds, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically in ointments and salves.
